competitors.aiSummary: Fluid enables AI agents to interact with lending and borrowing on Ethereum, via Base, with features like live APYs, TVL, and vault management.

tweets.fullText:
Make your agent Fluid.

→ https://t.co/s41TZNbRrt
An AI agent ( @laukiantonson) just completed its first lending and borrowing transaction on Fluid via @Base
.@moltxio already shipped a Fluid lending skill independently and on @base

Fluid's skill file gives any agent everything it needs:

→ Query live APYs and TVL via onchain resolvers
→ Deposit and withdraw ERC-4626 fTokens
→ Open, manage, and close vault positions
→ Monitor liquidation risk in real time

One integration. Every market. No keys required.

Ethereum is the home of AI Agents and Fluid is powering Autonomous Finance.

→ AI agents can now interact with Fluid directly.
→ Deposit. Borrow. Check positions. Manage vaults.

All onchain.

Smart Liquidity, now programmable. 🌊 https://t.co/kPoDtdSSPK

competitors.aiSummary: Compound launches on Unichain, adds wstETH and UNI as collateral, and recovers from Discord and website security breaches.

tweets.fullText:
Compound is live on @unichain

wstETH, weETH, ezETH, BTC, and UNI can be used as collateral to borrow ETH.

View the new market: https://t.co/O9w8lCw3SB https://t.co/aClBEySYMi

In June 2020, the Compound protocol was decentralized with the launch of COMP and the full transfer of control to the community through governance. As a foundational piece of decentralized finance infrastructure, Compound is designed to exist in perpetuity—open, autonomous, and

Attention: On 9/20/24 the Compound community’s Discord server was compromised.

Access has been regained and secured.

Always stay vigilant for scams and do not click any suspicious links.

As we noted, the issue did not impact the protocol; and no smart contracts were compromised.

We will provide further details on the investigation soon.

This is our final message // end of tweet.

✅ Update: Thanks to the tenacious efforts of so many in the community, the https://t.co/Dcq4ZkswRX website is once again secure. Please always remain vigilant in clicking links to avoid phishing scams.
